8004.issue: [W8004] Please process PR [[#94] "[iobroker-bot] Add Dependabot Ignore Rule for @types/node Major Version Updates"](https://github.com/ticaki/ioBroker.hyperion-connector/issues/94)

8906.issue: [S8906] Some Dependabot entries ("npm", "github-actions") use "schedule: interval: monthly". Consider migrating to random cron schedule ("schedule: interval: cron") for load distribution.

8917.issue: [W8917] At least major versions of @types/node should not be updated by dependabot. Please add ignore block at dependabot.yml.

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.5.0" at [package.json](https://github.com/ticaki/ioBroker.hyperion-connector/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 22. Downgrade to node.js 22.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
